title: AppleSkin minimalistic icons
description: Replaces big overlay of hunger bars to a small scale under hunger bars
body:
# Apple Skin minimalistic icons
![resourcepack preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83d8dc8c3888a8c1cb74b79efaf638b4b1df7390.png)

<details>
<summary></summary>

Really proud of what I've done here with the icon and the description :)

</details>

Replaces big overlay of hunger bars to a small scale under hunger bars, all AppleSkin versions supported starting from 1.10.2

## Exhaustion scale is right under the saturation scale
![Exhaustion scale](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c7144a5231e8af17f603fa0b05f5956b7cf105b.png)
## In game animation
![in game animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14add256c32f0e2af083128da357650bf4ef18d0.gif)
![hunger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79a7190180825e55a0b64a8478042bf8ad25230c.gif)
